services.sectionSubtitle: Comprehensive design and development services to transform your vision into reality

s03.title: UI/UX Design
items: Product redesign (web, services, and mobile apps)
UI kits, design systems and component libraries
Hiring development teams via partner studios

process.sectionSubtitle: A proven methodology that delivers exceptional results through collaboration and iteration

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We start by understanding your goals, audience, and vision through collaborative workshops.

steps.title: Strategy
steps.description: We develop a comprehensive strategy that aligns design decisions with business objectives.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Our team creates stunning visual designs and interactive prototypes for validation.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: We bring designs to life with clean, performant code and meticulous attention to detail.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: We ensure a smooth launch and provide ongoing support to maximize your success.

about.p1: Founded in 2018, our studio brings together world-class designers and developers who share a passion for creating exceptional digital experiences.
about.p2: We believe in the power of design to transform businesses and create meaningful connections with audiences. Every project is an opportunity to push boundaries and craft something extraordinary.

pricing.sectionSubtitle: Clear pricing, no hidden fees. Choose the plan that works best for your goals.

full.title: Full Project
full.description:
We handle the entire design process — from research to final UI.
Best for new products, MVPs, and full redesigns.

team.title: Dedicated Team
team.description:
A design team integrated into your workflow for ongoing product development.
Ideal for long-term collaboration and scaling products.

ondemand.title: On-Demand
ondemand.description:
Flexible design support for specific tasks or quick iterations.
Perfect for small improvements, updates, or urgent needs

testimonials.sectionSubtitle: Don't just take our word for it—hear from the brands we've had the privilege to work with

cards.text: The team's multidisciplinary skills blew us away. From AR to 3D animation, they delivered a seamless project that exceeded expectations.
cards.name: David Kim

cards.text: Working with Studio was transformative. They understood our vision and delivered a brand identity that exceeded all expectations
cards.name: Olivia White

cards.text: The team's expertise in UX design completely revolutionized our product. User engagement increased by 300% after the redesign.
cards.name: Olivia White

cards.text: Professional, creative, and always ahead of schedule. Studio brought our e-commerce platform to life with a design that's both beautiful and conversion-focused
cards.name: Olivia White

cards.text: Their designs don't just look great; they perform. Since launch, our platform saw a 160% increase in user retention.
cards.name: Noah Williams

meta.title: Studio — Who we are — DEMKA DESIGN

a11y.aboutImageAlt: Two collaborators in cream jackets looking at a phone against a blue sky

about.lead1: We are a design studio specializing in digital products and user experiences.
about.lead2: From websites and mobile apps to complex systems, our goal is to make products clear, intuitive, and beautifully designed

team.title: The People Behind Studio
team.lead: Our team includes designers, engineers, and storytellers who see design as our language.

journey.title: Our journey
journey.lead: Each achievement reflects our commitment to excellence and growth.
items:
We started the studio with a focus on clarity and product thinking.
Our first projects helped define our approach to design.
We expanded our work to more complex digital products and long-term collaborations. UX and product structure became a core part of our process.

We refined our approach, focusing on scalable systems and design consistency. Our projects became more structured, precise,
and product-driven.

We continue to evolve, helping teams build clear, functional, and visually refined products. Our focus remains the same — clarity, structure,
and meaningful design.

founder.ledeStrong:
We believe clarity
is at the core of good design —
founder.ledeMuted:
I wanted to build a studio
where every decision is intentional, and every detail — from structure to visuals — works together seamlessly
founder.mission: Our mission has always been clear: to create products that feel simple, refined, and meaningful
